games.title: Mario Kart 65
games.desc: Experience the thrill of racing with Mario and friends, in the classic karting game- Now in 3D! Nintendo Switch version available.

games.title: Dark Soles II
games.desc: A dark fantasy action-RPG about a cursed pair of "kicks" traveling to a ruined kingdom, in search of a special cure.
games.f1: Xbox, PS, Switch 2, and PC versions available
games.f3: Can run at up at 4K 60FPS or 1440p 120FPS on select systems.

games.title: Carl on Duty: Black Cops
games.desc: Be an officer. Be Carl. Save NYC from the hoodlums and criminals terrorizing the subways, in this new fast-paced justice shooter.

games.title: Call of Duty: Kitchen Patrol
games.desc: NATO's Soldiers won't feed themselves! Rush to the rescue and prepare delicious and fortifying meals for our men.
games.f3: Online Competitive Modes, with more coming soon!
